query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.role, u.team_role, u.team_member_id, tm.id as tm_id, tm.name as tm_name, tm.role as tm_role, tm.ghl_user_id FROM users u LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON u.team_member_id = tm.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Corey%' OR u.role IN ('admin', 'super_admin') LIMIT 10;
